calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-13-2006 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up
Off Calendar May-09-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Kathy Kollehner.
Douglas Holloway, Esq. for Plaintiff: Bank of the West.
Order waiving live testimony is in file.
After hearing the evidence presented and reviewed declaration of Ernest Knowles, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Divine Faith Ministries, Inc., as follows:
Principal $78,368.62
Prejudgment Interest $2,086.47
Attorney's Fees $2,500.00
Costs $395.00, for a total of $83,350.09
Plaintiff is also entitled to the leased equipments listed in Exhibit "A" attachment to the Judgment, see scanned doc. for details.
Judgment signed in open court.
